meaning: n.擦除,抹掉,擦除(或删去)的字.记号等
examples: The default text is selected to allow easy erasure.
I was on the brink of becoming a lawyer. This erasure saves me.
The current issue of Neuron features a new study on selective memory erasure.
According to the Supreme Court, the erasure of the debt becomes a sort of twilight income.
States including New York and New Jersey often check standardized tests for suspicious patterns of erasure marks.
